summary: Iteration 16 - Global Discounts & Loyalty Settings: All features tested and working. Backend APIs (GET /api/discounts/settings, POST /api/discounts/calculate, GET /api/discounts/check-loyalty/{email}, PUT /api/settings) all functional. Admin Panel Discounts & Loyalty tab fully operational with all 4 toggles working (Referral, Group, Combo, Loyalty). EnrollmentPage correctly hides/shows referral field based on enable_referral setting. 13 backend tests passed 100%. Phone OTP is MOCKED.
critical_code_review_comments: discounts.py: GET /settings returns all 8 discount fields with proper defaults
discounts.py: POST /calculate correctly applies group discount first, then combo on remaining amount
discounts.py: check-loyalty/{email} queries enrollments collection for existing UID
site_settings.py: PUT /api/settings accepts all discount fields via SiteSettingsUpdate model

models.py: SiteSettings model includes enable_referral, enable_group_discount, group_discount_rules, enable_combo_discount, combo_discount_pct, combo_min_programs, enable_loyalty, loyalty_discount_pct
DiscountsTab.jsx: All 4 sections with toggles, inputs, and Add Rule functionality
DiscountsTab.jsx: Active Discounts Preview section shows status of all features
EnrollmentPage.jsx: fetchDiscountSettings on mount, passes showReferral={discountSettings.enable_referral} to ParticipantRow
CartPage.jsx: Same pattern - fetches discountSettings, passes showReferral to CartItemCard
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing programs and settings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 16 discount features verified: 1) GET /api/discounts/settings returns all 8 discount settings, 2) POST /api/discounts/calculate correctly calculates group (10% for 3+), combo (5% for 2+ programs), loyalty (8% for returning clients with UID), 3) PUT /api/settings saves all discount fields, 4) Admin Panel Discounts & Loyalty tab shows all 4 features with toggles and inputs, 5) EnrollmentPage hides/shows referral checkbox based on enable_referral setting, 6) CartPage same conditional logic. Current settings: referral=ON, group=ON(3+→10%), combo=ON(2+→5%), loyalty=ON(8%). Phone OTP is MOCKED.

mocked_features.phone_otp: MOCKED - OTP generated server-side, returned in API response field 'mock_otp' for testing

backend_discount_settings_api.GET /api/discounts/settings: PASS - Returns all 8 fields with defaults
backend_discount_settings_api.POST /api/discounts/calculate: PASS - Correctly calculates group, combo, loyalty discounts
backend_discount_settings_api.GET /api/discounts/check-loyalty/{email}: PASS - Returns is_returning=false for new users

admin_panel_discounts_tab.discounts_tab_visible: PASS - Tab labeled 'Discounts & Loyalty' in sidebar
admin_panel_discounts_tab.referral_section: PASS - Toggle + info text when ON
admin_panel_discounts_tab.group_discount_section: PASS - Toggle + Add Rule button + rule inputs
admin_panel_discounts_tab.save_button: PASS - Saves settings with toast confirmation
admin_panel_discounts_tab.active_discounts_preview: PASS - Shows status of all 4 features

enrollment_page_referral_toggle.referral_hidden_when_off: PASS - 'Referred by' checkbox not shown when enable_referral=false
enrollment_page_referral_toggle.referral_shown_when_on: PASS - 'Referred by a Divine Iris member' checkbox visible when enable_referral=true
enrollment_page_referral_toggle.referrer_name_input: PASS - Input appears when checkbox is checked

cart_page_referral_toggle.conditional_rendering: PASS - Code verified to pass showReferral={discountSettings.enable_referral} to CartItemCard
